Why Is Skin Disease-Focused Q32 Bio Stock Trading Lower On Wednesday?
data.description: Q32 Bio reports Phase 2a SIGNAL-AA trial results for bempikibart in alopecia areata, showing safety and modest efficacy. Trial expansion planned.

data.title: Cellectar Biosciences Stock Plunges As Cancer-Focused Cancer Firm Pursues Strategic Options
data.description: Due to FDA communications, Cellectar Biosciences will explore options for development of its cancer drug. Focus on isotopes for solid tumors.
